steps.title: Set up the inequality test
steps.content: Need every $(x,y)$ in the table to satisfy $y<5x+6$.

steps.title: Test each table
steps.content: Compute $5x+6$ at each $x$: at $x=3$ bound is $21$, at $x=5$ bound is $31$, at $x=7$ bound is $41$. Choice A has $y=17,27,37$, all strictly less than the bounds. Other choices fail at least one row.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: Only choice A satisfies $y<5x+6$ throughout. That matches choice A — A is correct.
